name: SINBAD CREW BASE
description: Sinbad Crew Base (SCB) is a community-driven token deployed on the Base network as part of the broader Sinbad Network ecosystem. The project focuses on onboarding users into Web3 through participation, education and gradual on-chain interaction. Sinbad Network operates a mobile mining and social participation system where users complete daily tasks, engage in community activities and learn how decentralized tools function. SCB acts as the Base network layer of this ecosystem, allowing community members to interact with wallets, swaps and decentralized trading in a simple and guided environment. The token is used to encourage participation, community events, rewards, airdrops and ecosystem activities. The long-term goal is to transition existing off-chain community members into active on-chain users and familiarize them with blockchain usage through real interaction rather than speculation.
